homepage.title: Home - The Diocese of Sheffield
headings: h2: Find what you're looking for
h2: A Church of England diocese working in South Yorkshire and the southern parts of the East Riding of Yorkshire.
h3: Find what you’re looking for…
homepage.text_excerpt: Home - The Diocese of Sheffield Skip to content Safeguarding Survivor Support Lifelong Learning Directory Contact Church Support Ordained Ministry All the resources and encouragement on offer for clergy and their households Lay Ministries An overview of the many forms of lay ministry in our Diocese For Churches Helping and supporting parishes in all aspects of church life Safeguarding We have a professionally qualified safeguarding team who are the first point of contact for any concerns or queries in this area Centenary Project Equipping local church to disciple a new generation of young people, children and families. Ordained Ministry All the resources and encouragement on offer for clergy and their households Clergy Housing Our housing team, led by Michael, work hard to make sure that you can have peace of mind about your […] Initial Ministerial Education (IME2) IME2 aims to form and equip ministers who enable God’s people in God’s mission. Oversight Ministry A short introduction to the role of Oversight Ministry in the Diocese Chaplaincy Information about all of our different forms of chaplaincy across the Diocese. Permission to Officiate Authorisation granted by the Bishop for retired or non-stipendiary clergy to minister within the diocese. Ministerial Development Review Information and important forms for the full MDR process Partners Together A network of spouses, partners and families of the clergy supporting one another. Wellbeing in Ministry Information about dignity and flourishing in ministry. OMD – Clergy Resources and programmes to help clergy keep growing in their skills and spiritual life Sabbaticals Information and support about organising a Sabbatical Lay Ministries An overview of the many forms of lay ministry in our Diocese Reader Ministry How to train as a reader in the diocese of Sheffield, resources and events available to readers in the diocese Focal Ministry Supporting and resourcing Focal Ministers Children & Youth Ministry See how your parish can grow younger by loving and serving your community Spiritual Accompaniment Information about the ministry of spiritual accompaniment and two courses we offer Lay Parish Evangelists Information about Lay Parish Evangelist Ministry and how to explore a calling to this. Commissioned Lay Ministries Recognising the many forms of ministries serving Jesus in our churches and communities Ongoing Ministerial Development for Lay Ministers Useful resources and learning opportunities for all licensed, authorised and commissioned lay ministers. The Barnabas Blog A regular blog supporting ministry leaders For Churches Helping and supporting parishes in all aspects of church life Worship & Prayer Resources for church members & church leaders for corporate and individual prayer and worship Church Operations & Finance A wide variety of inspirational resources and guidance covering all things financial including generosity, grants and finance Church Buildings Guidance and support to help church leaders and PCCs make the most of their buildings Welcome & Belonging Support in giving a really warm welcome to people visiting our churches so that they want to return Church Growth, Evangelism & New Congregations Church growth, evangelism & new congregations is the Diocese of Sheffield fulfilling its vision Deliberately Digital Deliberately Digital is the Diocese of Sheffield’s approach to digital mission Environment & Climate Change The Earth is our common home and God calls us all to care for creation Social Transformation God has called and equipped us to seek restoration and transformation for the world around us Human Resources Helping church leaders and PCCs with human resources and employment issues. news_items.title: Vocation & Calling We have a passion to help Christians see that God’s calling is part of their normal life
Lights for Christ A model to help Christian disciples live out their baptismal calling to be lights in the world
Exploring Faith Exploring the Christian faith should be the most exciting adventure of your life.
Called to Ordination How do I become a vicar? All about the discernment process and the support we can give you
Curacies Information for those exploring their calling to serve in our Diocese.
Young Vocations The Church of England is actively seeking more young people to serve as ministers within the church.
Hearing God’s Call in Later Years Each of us hears God’s call at different times and in different ways
Global Majority Heritage Vocations The Diocese of Sheffield serves a vibrant and diverse population
Receiving the Light Resources that will help you in prayer, study, worship and spirituality.
Reflecting the Light Resources that will help you share your faith as you serve and live as disciples wherever you are.
Children, Youth & Families Resources for discipleship with young people and families
Life Events Marking the important milestones in your family’s life – weddings, baptisms & funerals
What’s On All the events and news stories from across the Diocese
Education Church of England Schools and Academies are a vital part of the work and ministry of the diocese
Who We Are Information about our Bishops, structures vision and strategy
Governance All about our governance structure, synods, boards and advisory groups
Central Team Here to help! Details of Diocesan central support team members
Directory A listing of all churches with key people and their roles
Vacancies Details of current Clergy, Centenary Project and Central Support opportunities
Weddings & Blessings Marrying in church is personal, meaningful, spiritual and beautiful, not just legal
Funerals Information about arranging a funeral in our Diocese
Event Recordings Recordings and other resources from key Diocesan events.
News & Stories News, stories and reflections from all around the Diocese
Good News Videos Good news video stories from around the Diocese
Training and Resources A group of resources relating to Diocesan Education.
SIAMS Inspections Statutory Inspection of Anglican and Methodist Schools

pages.title: The Words of Grace Podcast - The Diocese of Sheffield
pages.meta_description: From clergy to lay people across a broad range of traditions, we’ll ask what drew people to the Diocese and delve deeper into questions of faith.
